## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Contribution Type

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Principle
- [ ] Playbook guidance
- [ ] Pattern
- [ ] Control
- [ ] Evidence signal
- [ ] Schema or registry maintenance
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Script or tooling

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not include secrets, credentials, tokens, private keys, or sensitive data.
- [ ] I did not include customer-specific, confidential, or proprietary material.
- [ ] I did not add product-specific strategy, vendor promotion, or marketing copy.
- [ ] I did not add instructions that ask coding agents to bypass security, tests, review, authorization, privacy, or validation.
- [ ] I did not weaken existing security, data, AI, deployment, observability, recovery, or cost-control guidance.
- [ ] I did not add external links unless they are necessary and trustworthy.
- [ ] I mapped new guidance to existing capabilities where relevant.
- [ ] I avoided creating new top-level capability categories.

## Review Notes

Call out anything maintainers should review carefully, especially changes to:

- `AGENTS.md`
- scripts
- schemas
- registry records
- security, data, AI, or deployment guidance
- external links
